design_philosophy.identity: Uber for Laundry - Trust, Speed, Cleanliness
core_principles: Trust through Transparency: Clear pricing, clear process, clear status.
Tactile Cleanliness: Use white space, soft shadows, and rounded corners to evoke fresh laundry.
Efficiency First: Primary actions (Order, Track) are always accessible.
Human Connection: Showcase real people (Washers) and happy clients.
design_philosophy.theme_strategy: Light Mode Foundation (Cleanliness). Dark Mode optional for 'Night' contexts or heavy data usage.

rules: Never use pure black (#000000) for text. Use Slate-900 (#0F172A).

buttons.primary: bg-teal-600 hover:bg-teal-700 text-white font-medium rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-200 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-200
buttons.ghost: text-teal-600 hover:bg-teal-50 hover:text-teal-700 font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.base: w-full rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-3 text-slate-900 focus:border-teal-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500/20 transition-all outline-none
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5

navigation.header: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-100/50 h-16 flex items-center transition-all
navigation.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-40 bg-white border-t border-slate-200 pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center md:hidden

hero.usage: Hero section background or split layout image

urban_lifestyle.usage: Features section, 'How it works' for clients

instructions_to_main_agent: Respect the 'Teal' constraint but modernize it to Tailwind's Teal-600/700.
Maintain all existing texts and slogans ('Libérez votre temps...', 'Générez un revenu...').
Preserve all existing functionality (Simulators, Stripe, Supabase). DO NOT delete logic, only re-skin.
Ensure the layout is responsive (Mobile First).
Replace generic cards with the 'Cards.Base' style defined above.
Apply 'Plus Jakarta Sans' to all Headings (h1-h6) and 'Inter' to body.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index hierarchy).
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky elements.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, active, focus).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can add a premium feel.
Never use AI assistant emojis for icons.
